summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Agent Configuration Manager (ACM) eval functionality. Tested backend APIs, frontend UI components, and integration workflows.

ui_bugs.issue: Problem statement card missing on job detail page despite having dataset with problem_statement

passed_tests: Backend API: All 15 eval API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Backend API: Eval stats endpoint returns proper format with all status types
Backend API: Dataset listing and filtering by type works correctly
Backend API: Job submission, listing, and detail retrieval functional
Backend API: Health checks for eval and builder APIs working
Frontend: EvalRuns page loads with status cards showing proper counts
Frontend: Job table displays with problem statement snippets under each row
Frontend: Job detail navigation works from job row clicks
Frontend: Job detail page shows progress timeline and scores correctly
Frontend: Agent list page functional with search and provider filtering
Frontend: Agent dropdown menu contains all expected options (Edit, Clone, Run Eval, Export YAML, Version History)
Frontend: RunEvalModal opens successfully from agent dropdown
Frontend: RunEvalModal shows 3-step wizard (Select Problems, Configure, Review & Submit)
Frontend: Dataset type filtering works in RunEvalModal
Frontend: Dataset selection and preview functionality works
Integration: Frontend successfully communicates with backend APIs
Integration: External eval API properly proxied through backend
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix missing problem statement card on job detail page - the JobDetail.js component should display the problem statement card when dataset.problem_statement is available

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 minor UI issue with problem statement card)
